subject: fix(graph): use neutral/neutral-content for node and edge text readability
body:
Nodes now use DaisyUI neutral background with neutral-content text,
ensuring consistent readability across light and dark themes. Edge label
outlines removed — edge text also uses neutral-content for consistency.
Label-based colors retained on borders for visual differentiation.

Tags: graph, cytoscape, theming, readability
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: graph-styling
Semver: patch
